narrative_beat: Wide final anjo medieval com asas abertas sobre mundo P&B em luz dourada divina

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a final epic wide shot of a medieval angel with wings open in rich crimson, ochre and gold, hovering above a desaturated black-and-white world with distant cities
subject.focal_point: the angel's illuminated face and golden halo
subject.secondary: Golden divine light envelops the angel; orange embers float throughout the entire composition; the scene is monumental.
props: medieval angel with open wings in rich colors

environment.location: an apocalyptic sky above a fallen world

composition.foreground: angel in rich crimson, ochre and gold with divine halo
composition.midground: clouds of embers between angel and world
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white world with distant cities and horizon

lighting.rim_light: gold on wing feathers and robe folds

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: angel as call to share the warning

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
